mainEntity.name: Why does aquaculture feed cake during the rainy season in the Mekong Delta?

acceptedAnswer.text: High relative humidity (above 85% RH) causes moisture absorption in feed pellets. Silsep's mesoporous silica (AquaPure™) acts as a molecular sieve, using capillary condensation to lock moisture and ammonia away from the feed surface, preventing caking.

mainEntity.name: How can I maintain enzyme activity in fish feed at 95% humidity?

acceptedAnswer.text: Research from the UCSD-affiliated Silsep lab confirms that AquaPure™ mesoporous silica achieves an 88% enzyme recovery rate under 95% humidity conditions (Trial #22), significantly outperforming generic silica products (45% recovery).

mainEntity.name: Is AquaPure™ safe for high-density shrimp farming?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, AquaPure™ is a food-grade, high-purity silicon dioxide (SiO2) that meets international aquaculture safety standards and has been tested in 38 Southeast Asian field trials.
